title: 2003 London Broncos season

{{Infobox rugby league team season | year = 2003 | team_colour = red; border:solid blue 1px | font_colour = gold | league = Super League | league_link = [[Super League VIII]] | league_rank = 5th | league_wins = 14 | league_draws = 2 | league_losses = 13 | points_for = 697 | points_against = 729 | playoff_result = Eliminated Week 1 | cup = Challenge Cup | cup_result = Fifth round | cup_wins = 1 | cup_losses = 1 | CEO_title = Chairman | CEO = David Hughes | coach_title = | coach = [[Tony Rea]] | captain = [[Jim Dymock]] | stadium = [[Griffin Park]] | avg_attendance = 3,383 | high_attendance = 5,666 | top_tries = [[Dennis Moran (rugby league)|Dennis Moran]] - 24 | top_goals = [[Chris Thorman]] - 81 | top_points = Chris Thorman - 195 | pattern_la1 = _navyborder | pattern_b1 = _bluecollar_2 | pattern_ra1 = _navyborder | pattern_sh1 = _yellowsides | pattern_so1 = _bluetop | leftarm1 = FE2712 | body1 = FE2712 | rightarm1 = FE2712 | shorts1 = 002387 | socks1 = FE2712 | pattern_la2 = _whitelower | pattern_b2 = | pattern_ra2 = _whitelower | pattern_sh2 = _yellowsides | pattern_so2 = _bluetop | leftarm2 = 002387 | body2 = 002387 | rightarm2 = 002387 | shorts2 = 002387 | socks2 = FE2712 | prev_season = [[2002 London Broncos season|2002]] | next_season = [[2004 London Broncos season|2004]] | list = yes | list_link = List of London Broncos seasons }} The '''2003 London Broncos season''' was the twenty-fourth in the club's history and their eighth season in the [[Super League]]. The club was coached by [[Tony Rea]], competing in [[Super League VIII]] and finishing in 5th place. The club also got to the fifth round of the [[2003 Challenge Cup|Challenge Cup]]. ==Super League VIII table== {{Super League VIII ladder|showteam=LON}} ==Play-offs== {{6TeamBracket-McIntyre | RD1 = Elimination play-offs | RD2 = Qualifying/Elimination semifinal | RD3 = Elimination final | RD4 = [[2003 Super League Grand Final|Grand Final]] | RD1-text1 = | RD1-team1 = {{leagueicon|Wigan|12px}} '''[[Wigan Warriors]]''' | RD1-score1 = 25 | RD1-team2 = {{leagueicon|Warrington|12px}} [[Warrington Wolves]] | RD1-score2 = 12 | RD1-text2 = | RD1-team3 = {{leagueicon|St Helens|12px}} '''[[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]]''' | RD1-score3 = 24 | RD1-team4 = {{leagueicon|London|12px}} [[London Broncos]] | RD1-score4 = 6 | RD2-text1 = | RD2-team1 = {{leagueicon|Bradford|12px}} '''[[Bradford Bulls]]''' | RD2-score1 = 30 | RD2-team2 = {{leagueicon|Leeds|12px}} [[Leeds Rhinos]] | RD2-score2 = 14 | RD2-text2 = | RD2-team3 = {{leagueicon|Wigan|12px}} '''[[Wigan Warriors]]''' | RD2-score3 = 40 | RD2-team4 = {{leagueicon|St Helens|12px}} [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]] | RD2-score4 = 24 | RD3-text1 = | RD3-team1 = {{leagueicon|Leeds|12px}} [[Leeds Rhinos]] | RD3-score1 = 22 | RD3-team2 = {{leagueicon|Wigan|12px}} '''[[Wigan Warriors]]''' | RD3-score2 = 23 | RD4-text1 = | RD4-team1 = {{leagueicon|Bradford|12px}} '''[[Bradford Bulls]]''' | RD4-score1 = 25 | RD4-team2 = {{leagueicon|Wigan|12px}} [[Wigan Warriors]] | RD4-score2 = 12 }}
